reviews.review_description:
I downloaded this game and didn’t play it for a little while, I wish I had played it right away, this game is actually amazing! Albeit I wish there was a way to mark where in the map you have been as it is easy to get lost, causing frustration to the player very quickly. The movement is also a little bit difficult to get used to, the way that you easily get caught on things or have your character moved back by simply clipping things is a tad bit annoying but overall funny. 

The tracker for the monster is finicky as it’s difficult to track something when you can’t pinpoint a location or direction (which might just be a mechanic) and the hitboxes on things makes it really hard to properly get away.

Other than that it’s a really fun game and I would highly recommend it to those getting a vr! We are going to do our best to try and beat it and hopefully these kinks are worked out!


One tip for new players, DO NOT STOP MOVING!!

reviews.review_title: Well, the game is so cool. I love it so
reviews.review_description: Gooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooood game, I played it for so long, but with more players, it could be better than anything ￼
If you play horror or are good at monky games then this is great for you and the difficulty is good but maybe make the monster go slower or make it easier but very good

developer_response.body: Thank you for the feedback! You can suggest new ideas or changes in the Discord server if you'd like: discord.gg/4zYNwZXFFn

reviews.review_title: This is a good game u should play it
reviews.review_description: I am writing this review because they have work hard on this game and it payed off because the monster look cool the cosmetics are cool there is also a level 2 even with more cool monster but realize that this game barely came out so there should be more things like more maps more cosmetics but this game is just crack no cap
